memberdef.argsstring: (XDp *InstancePtr, Vpg_VidgenConfig *VidgenConfig, u8 Stream, u8 VSplitMode, u8 first_time)
memberdef.name: VidgenSetConfig

briefdescription.para: This function calculates video pattern generator parameters.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDp instance.
is a pointer to Vpg_VidgenConfig that will be used to timing parameters.
is the stream number that will be used to ret rive MSA parameters.
specifies vertical split mode to be used for splitting resolution vertically.

briefdescription.para: This function writes timing parameters to Video Pattern Generator core.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDp instance.
is a pointer to Vpg_VidgenConfig that will be used to write parameter values into Video Pattern Generator core registers.
is the stream number used to identify the steam for which parameters to be written.

briefdescription.para: This function calculates the M-VID if synchronous mode is used.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDp instance.
is a pointer to Vpg_VidgenConfig used to update calculated M-VID value.

briefdescription.para: This function computes M and D value.
This function sets pattern to generate in Video Pattern Generator core.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDp instance.
is the stream number for which to set the pattern.

briefdescription.para: This function starts audio pattern generator.
This function stops audio pattern generator.
This function updates required timing values in Video Pattern Generator core.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDp instance.
specifies vertical split mode to be used for splitting resolution vertically.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if Video pattern configured successfully.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDp instance.

briefdescription.para: This function waits for PLL lock.

simplesect.para: pass/fail result. If there is error, none-zero value will return
